sql.oracle: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_CONFIG BEFORE INSERT ON TGQCONFIG FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO TGQCRITERIOQF (ID, DESCRICAO, IDCONFIG) SELECT ROWNUM, O.OPCAO, :NEW.IDCONFIG FROM TDDCAM C, TDDOPC O WHERE C.NUCAMPO = O.NUCAMPO AND C.NOMETAB = 'TGQQUALIFFORN' AND C.NOMECAMPO = 'QUALIFICACAO'; END; /

CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_UPD_DOC_QLD AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON TGQCONTDOC FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO TGQHISTSTATUS (IDHIST, IDDOCUMENTO, STATUS, DATASTATUS, USUARIO) VALUES (SEQ_HISTSTATUS.NEXTVAL, :NEW.IDDOC, :NEW.STATUS, SYSDATE, STP_GET_CODUSULOGADO()); END; /
